# UI Design Rules

Follow these rules for every frontend change.

## Design Language

Theme: Luxury premium SaaS

Inspiration:
- Modern luxury real estate websites
- Apple-level spacing
- Linear polish
- Premium fintech dashboards

## Colors

Background:
- White (#FFFFFF)

Text:
- Charcoal (#1E293B)

Accent:
- Gold (#D4AF37)

## Typography

Headings:
- Playfair Display

Body:
- Inter

## Components

Use ShadCN UI components.

Cards:
- rounded-2xl
- shadow-soft
- subtle borders

Buttons:
- Primary = gold accent
- Secondary = outline

## Layout

- Large whitespace
- 8px spacing scale
- Max width containers
- Responsive mobile-first

## Avoid

- Neon colors
- Gradient overload
- Glassmorphism
- Cartoon styling
- Tiny fonts

## Every UI update must

1. Use existing design tokens.
2. Use Tailwind classes.
3. Preserve responsiveness.
4. Follow accessibility best practices.
